languages.text: {n}Себериан благосклонно взмахивает рукой.{/n} "Поднимись, дитя. Тридцать второй полк? Не может быть..."
{n}Seberian waves his hand in a benevolent gesture.{/n} "Rise, child. The 32nd Regiment? It cannot be..."
languages.original_text: {n}Себериан благосклонно взмахивает рукой.{/n} "Поднимись, дитя. Тридцать второй полк? Не может быть..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian waves his hand in a gesture of favour.{/n} "Rise, child. The 32nd regiment? It cannot be..."

languages.text: {n}Seberian macht eine wohlwollende Geste mit seiner Hand.{/n} "Erhebt Euch, Kind. Das 32. Regiment? Das kann nicht sein ..."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian waves his hand in a benevolent gesture.{/n} "Rise, child. The 32nd Regiment? It cannot be..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian macht eine wohlwollende Geste mit seiner Hand.{/n} "Erhebt Euch, Kind. Das 32. Regiment? Das kann nicht sein ..."

languages.text: {n}Seberian lui adresse un geste bienveillant de la main.{/n} « Levez-vous, mon enfant. Le 32e régiment ? C'est impossible... »
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian waves his hand in a benevolent gesture.{/n} "Rise, child. The 32nd Regiment? It cannot be..."

languages.text: {n}Seberian hace un gesto benévolo con la mano.{/n} «Levanta, muchacha. ¿El 32.º regimiento? No puede ser...».
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian waves his hand in a benevolent gesture.{/n} "Rise, child. The 32nd Regiment? It cannot be..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian hace un gesto benévolo con la mano.{/n} «Levanta, muchacha. ¿El 32.º regimiento? No puede ser...».

languages.text: {n}Seberian, şefkatli bir hareketle elini sallıyor.{/n} "Kalk çocuğum. 32. Alay mı? Olamaz..."
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian waves his hand in a benevolent gesture.{/n} "Rise, child. The 32nd Regiment? It cannot be..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seberian, şefkatli bir hareketle elini sallıyor.{/n} "Kalk çocuğum. 32. Alay mı? Olamaz..."

languages.text: {n}塞贝里安摆了摆手，像是在施以恩典。{/n}“起来吧，孩子。第32团？这怎么可能……”
languages.original_text: {n}Seberian waves his hand in a benevolent gesture.{/n} "Rise, child. The 32nd Regiment? It cannot be..."

traits.locale_text: {n}塞贝里安摆了摆手，像是在施以恩典。{/n}“起来吧，孩子。第32团？这怎么可能……”

languages.text: {n}セベリアンは慈悲に満ちた手ぶりをする。{/n}「起きなさい、子供。32連隊？それはありえない…」
